steps.title: Use the fish contrast
steps.content: The passage distinguishes diadromous fish, whose life cycle requires migration between biomes, from merely euryhaline fish, which can tolerate high salinity without such migration. The blank needs a phrase meaning clearly separated from.

steps.title: Reject unrelated relations
steps.content: B suggests being reformed into something, C suggests origin or descent, and D suggests being wrongly merged with another group. The sentence instead needs a term for drawing a boundary between two categories. The answer is A.
